{{nihongo|'''Okitsushima Shrine'''|奥津嶋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 奥津嶋神社 |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|奥津嶋神社]]
本殿（左奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月8日|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=奥津嶋神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''奥津嶋神社'''（おきつしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|近江八幡市|Q385461}}{{jalink|沖島|Q2017235|沖島町}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|奥津島比売命}} === 神紋 === 笹竜胆 === 由緒 === {{jalink|和銅|Q1373026}}5年（{{jalink|712年|Q23521}}）に勅命を蒙った{{jalink|藤原不比等|Q177517}}によって創祀されたと伝わる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}とされる通説はこれを{{jalink|大嶋神社奥津嶋神社|Q11435100}}に充てる。。 === 祭り === * 例祭 :5月8日に行われる。 === 境内社 === * 厳島神社 * 山神神社 === 文化財等 === * 奥津島神社記 - {{jalink|大永|Q1193564}}5年（{{jalink|1525年|Q6314}}）に記された社記 * 辯才天記（{{jalink|享保|Q1145048}}19年） === 脚注 === {{reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|lt=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}{{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|Myōjin-tai}})
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建 = {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 8|Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Okinoshima|Q2017235|Okinoshima-chō}}, {{jalink|Ōmihachiman|Q385461}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Its {{jalink|former shrine rank}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{jalink|712|Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{jalink|Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{jalink|Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{jalink|Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{jalink|1525|Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Its {{ill||lt=former shrine rank|UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

(P460) == * {{ill|Oitsushimano Shrine|lt=Oitsushimano Shrine|WD=Q135039808|1=Oitsushimano Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|WD=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おきつしましんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]
