== * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市沖島町188', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県近江八幡市北津田町', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Okitsushima-jinja}} [[JA:奥津嶋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11445964}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]]

content == {{神社 |名称 = Okitsushima Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Okitusima jinja.jpg|270px|Okitsushima Shrine]]
Main sanctuary (left rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}{{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}} 188 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|11|59.7|N|136|03|14.0|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} |社格 = Candidate for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin-tai|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=May 8|Q2555|WD=Q2555|1=May 8}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Okitsushima Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Okitsushima Shrine''' (おきつしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Okinoshima|Q2017235|WD=Q2017235|lt=Okinoshima-chō|1=Okishima}}, {{ill|lt=Ōmihachiman|Q385461|WD=Q385461|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Okitsushimahime|Q11350295|WD=Q11350295|lt=Okitsushimahime-no-Mikoto|1=Russian Braille}} === Shrine crest === Sasa-rindō === Origin === It is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=712|Q23521|WD=Q23521|1=712}} (Wadō 5) by {{ill|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|Q177517|WD=Q177517|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} under imperial command. It is regarded as the {{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''The standard view identifies this as {{ill|lt=Ōshima Shrine Okitsushima Shrine|Q11435100|WD=Q11435100|1=Ōshima & Okitsushima Shrine}}.. === Festival === * Annual festival :Held on May 8. === Precinct shrines === * Itsukushima Shrine * Yamagami Shrine === Cultural properties, etc. === * ''Okitsushima Jinja-ki'' - shrine record written in {{ill|lt=1525|Q6314|WD=Q6314|1=1525}} (Daiei 5) * ''Benzaiten-ki'' (Kyōhō 19) === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=281 奥津嶋神社]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okitsushima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名おきつしましんしや]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江八幡市の歴史]] [[Category:近江八幡市の建築物]]
